_note: Bench v2 ground truth. knowledge cases: needle = case-insensitive substring (| = OR) over title+file, judged against r['knowledge'] (track) AND r['results'] (continuity). code cases: accept = exact (file, symbol) pairs judged ONLY against r['code'] — substring judging measured false hits (dashboard.py matched tests/test_dashboard.py). DE probes document the language gap after the EN-only corpus migration and are NEVER gated. Every code-case note carries the verified ground-truth location.
